title: Bigfoot: Blood on the Farm
overview: " Bigfoot Blood on the Farm " is a tense, heart-pounding thriller about family, survival, and the terrifying unknown that lurks in the shadows of the woods. Two sisters find themselves alone on their rural farm, facing an unimaginable terror. " Bigfoot ". With the farm isolated and no one else around to help, the sisters must quickly shift from surviving farm life to surviving the fight of their lives.
